messages.description: Specifies the level-of-detail number. Level 0 is the base image level. Level n is the nth mipmap reduction image.
Specifies the xoffset and yoffset parameters. The lower left corner of the texture image is (xoffset, yoffset).
Specifies the x, y, width, and height parameters, which specify a subregion of the framebuffer.

arguments.description: Specifies the level-of-detail number. Level 0 is the base image level. Level n is the nth mipmap reduction image.
Specifies the xoffset and yoffset parameters. The lower left corner of the texture image is (xoffset, yoffset).
Specifies the x, y, width, and height parameters, which specify a subregion of the framebuffer.
